block.title: Welcome to One Identity Safeguard for Privileged Sessions
Specify which index to use for SPS events

input.label: Index to use (Do not delete the `index=` part)

block.title: Specify which index to use for log events

input.label: Index to use (Do not delete the `index=` part)

block.title: Data input
block.text: If you have previously created an Index to receive data, specify that one in the 'Index to use' field.

If you have no previous data stored, setup a TCP Data Input with oneidentity_sps_siem_syslog for 'Source type', One Identity Safeguard for Privileged Sessions for 'App context' and sps_index (or your index) for 'Index' in Settings->Data Inputs->Input Settings.
